tweets.text:
And finally I wanna shoutout @katatatat__ who Day 2d the GCFE with this cool Blaziken Tailroom team with Vanilluxe!

I played them on ladder today and Life Orb Basc was an actual demon! And Scarf Vanilluxe is such a cool option that’s faster and hits harder than A-Tales (12/13)

Next I wanna talk the 6 that was popularized by @NikyuAlex 

You see this a lot on ladder. It’s got some really cool techs. Yawn Torkoal is super disruptive and Aero as a Tailwind setter is actually really cool paired with Blaziken you get so much speed and offense (11/13)

And let’s talk @WhimsicottVG’s T16 GCFE team!

Two things really stand out to me. 

The first is Life Orb Dnite. That guy is goated into pesky Delphox Blastoise comps and hard solos them

And Toxapex is just a damn menace in general it’s cool to see on a non-Zard comp (10/13)

First off let’s talk SnorlaxPikachu’s GCFE T16 team!

I really like the combo of Mega Venusaur here. It really dunks on Floette and is even a good bring non-mega with Cholorophyl. It’s also a lot more reliable into Rain

I also like Lycanroc Dusk for more Anti-Zard/Gambit (9/13)

And there are two more most haves for your Blaziken team:
1. Weather Control
2. Garchomp Hate

Most people choose to use a snow setter to handle both! SnorlaxPikachu used Sash Ninetales Alola, @WhimsicottVG used M-Frosslass, and @katatatat__ used scarf Vanilluxe! (7/13)

Unfortunately this guy does have a few weaknesses that give him trouble:

Basculegion, Garchomp, Delphox, Fairigraf, And Intimidate slowing him down

Thankfully you threaten 4/5 of these with Blaze’s Best Buddy Kingambit! These two are a match made in heaven (4/13)

Let’s start with the star of the show: Blaziken! What makes this guy so good? 
1. After a Speed Boost he’s outspeeding everyone
2. He walls Zard Y AND Kingambit (not many mons do)
3. Fire + Fighting + Rock Hits a lot of really important Mons right now (2/13)

Team Spotlight: Mega Blaziken!

This chicken is a spicy pick that’s kickin butt in Reg M-B! It’s unique offensive combination is really good into a lot of top meta threats with now — provided you give it the right support! So let’s talk Blaziken and some of its spicy teams (1/1?)
